suggested_questions.question: How many sales employees are in each zone and division within the roster?
Which states have the highest field sales headcount, split by employee designation?
How are employees distributed by city across the Retail division versus other divisions?
What percentage of employees are in the Sales department within each zone?
Which position codes have the most employees assigned, and which zones are they in?
What are the top 10 cities by count of unique employee user logins?
How many unique employees have multiple position codes within the same state?
Which employees are listed under more than one city, and how frequently does this occur?
How does employee headcount by zone compare for TSI designation versus all other designations?
Which states have the widest variety of employee designations in the sales roster?
What is the average employee headcount per city, segmented by division?
Which zones have employee assignments concentrated into the fewest position codes?
Which cities have unusually high headcount compared with their state’s total headcount?
What is the employee designation breakdown within each zone to identify hierarchy coverage gaps?
Which position codes span multiple states, and how many states does each cover?
How many distinct user logins exist per designation, and how common are duplicate logins?
Which user logins appear shared across different employee IDs in the roster?
Which states have the highest proportion of employees outside the Sales department?
How evenly are Retail division employees distributed across zones and states?
What are the top 10 position codes with the broadest coverage across multiple cities?
Which zones have the highest ratio of employees to assigned position codes?
Are there cities where a single designation represents more than 80% of employees?
Which states show frequent repeats of employee names, suggesting possible roster duplication?
What is the unique employee count by zone, further broken down by department?
Which cities contain the most diverse mix of divisions among employees?
What share of each zone’s employees sits in its top three cities?
Which employee designations appear in every zone, and which are specific to certain zones?
Within each zone, how do states rank by total employee headcount?
Which position codes are associated with multiple divisions, and how many divisions per code?
Which cities have low employee headcount but many position codes, indicating fragmented assignments?
